title: Dependency manifest change is flagged for runtime evidence
text:
diff --git a/pyproject.toml b/pyproject.toml
--- a/pyproject.toml
+++ b/pyproject.toml
@@
 dependencies = [
   "mcp>=1.12.0",
+  "pydantic>=2.10.0",
 ]
intent: 依存を追加して schema validation を使う。
rationale: Dependency changes need compatibility, lockfile, security, and runtime impact evidence.
